metadata.description: Instadecks — Generate, review, content-review, and annotate polished presentation decks from any input shape (JSON / markdown / raw text / files). Four user-invocable slash skills (/instadecks:create, /review, /content-review, /annotate) powered by pptxgenjs + DECK-VDA design review + Phase 5 auto-refine convergence loop. 14 modern palettes, 9 typography pairings, 9 motifs, 30+ cookbook variants. 100% test coverage.

plugins.name: instadecks
plugins.description: Generate, review, and annotate polished presentation decks. Four slash skills (/instadecks:create, /review, /content-review, /annotate) powered by pptxgenjs + DECK-VDA design review + auto-refine convergence loop. Polymorphic brief intake (JSON, markdown, raw text, files); 14 modern palettes, 9 typography pairings, 9 motifs, 30+ cookbook variants. 100% test coverage (1210 tests).
